chunks.text: Technical Reports - Martin H. Graham. A Microsurge Meter for Electrical Pollution Research (M03/3) by Martin H. Graham. Mitigation of Electrical Pollution in the Home (M02/8) by Martin H. Graham. A Ubiquitous Pollutant (M00/55) by Martin H. Graham.

BITS and POTS Together (M97/45) by Martin H. Graham. Measurement of Stray Current in Cows (M95/74) by Martin H. Graham. Ethernet on One Phone Line (M89/26) by Martin H. Graham. High-Speed Data Transmission on Telephone Wires (M89/24) by Martin H. Graham.
